text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Time for summer camp. Kitasan Black feels
inferior compared to Tokai Teio and the other
racers who possess an innate brilliance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But for some reason, she doesn't get psyched out
by Gold Ship or Vodka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Umamusume tend to have either standard
personalities or find themselves as oddball
outliers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black likely finds herself more at home
with the oddball types. Talking with these two
helps her overcome her inferiority complex.
